title: A Resolution approving the Sangguniang Barangay of Batong Malake Ordinance No. 013-S-2025, dated July 1, 2025, entitled "An Ordinance Institutionalizing the Creation of Neighborhood Association per Purok in Barangay Batong malake, Los Baños, Laguna, to strengthen community participation, safety, and grassroots governance and for other purposes.
